query:
SELECT 
  h.id,
  h.claim_reference,
  h.vehicle_make,
  h.vehicle_model,
  h.vehicle_registration,
  h.accident_type,
  LEFT(h.incident_description, 200) AS incident_desc,
  h.incident_location,
  h.claimant_name,
  h.created_at
FROM historical_claims h
WHERE h.incident_description IS NOT NULL
  AND h.incident_description != ''
ORDER BY h.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
command:

  h.incident_location,
  h.claimant_name,
  h.created_at
FROM historical_claims h
WHERE h.incident_description IS NOT NULL
  AND h.incident_description != ''
ORDER BY h.created_at DESC
LIMIT 20;
